preReview.title: New England Revolution v New York City FC: Polster hails team effort in turning form around
preReview.description: New England Revolution are looking to make it back-to-back MLS wins when they welcome New York City FC to Gillette Stadium on Saturday.

QAData.question: Who won between New England Revolution and New York City FC on Sat, 19 Apr 2025 23:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: New England Revolution won 2–0 over New York City FC on Sat, 19 Apr 2025 23:30:00 GMT.
